provenance: EWSHM 2026 two-page report — attention-autoencoder reconstruction-error health score.
reference_note: SET1 (Jul 2022) is the healthiest reference period; the model and 99th-percentile threshold are fixed from SET1 and applied to SET2-SET5 without re-fitting.
score_definition: SET-level health score (0-100): autoencoder aggregate deviation index, 100 = SET1 reference.
anomaly_definition: Percentage of events exceeding the 99th-percentile SET1 reconstruction-error threshold (report Table 1).
coloring_note: Glyph coloring is modality-level (all accelerometers share the SET acc %, all strain gauges the SET strain %), from the report — not a per-sensor score.

SET3.label: Aug 2023
SET3.note: Closest in season to SET1 — least deviated held-out period.

SET4.label: Jan 2024
SET4.note: Coldest period (6.6 C) — most deviated from baseline.
